summary: Docs-only slice moved the user-provided learning methodology file into canonical product docs and synchronized product, MVP/v1/v2 stage and Harness docs. No runtime code, schema, API, generated client or UI was changed, and no downstream MVP learning/reporting unit was marked complete.

commands.note: Bootstrap checks passed; backend Maven step reported missing Java runtime, and duplicate long-running checks were terminated to avoid leaving sessions open.
Fresh verifier reran lightweight path/link/contradiction/status/runtime-scope scans and verify_harness; Java-backed make verify limitation accepted as non-blocking for docs-only slice.

documentation_updates.note: Canonical MVP methodology baseline with frontmatter, source refs and human gates.
Links methodology baseline and replaces stale 4-6/52-week/pre-post P1 wording.
Adds product_methodology and v0.2 executable decisions for future slices.
Inherits methodology baseline and refines only from pilot evidence.
Starts adaptive/AI/social work from methodology guardrails.

evidence: stage artifacts and no downstream completion IDs

api_openapi_notes: No public REST controller or OpenAPI surface was changed; generated TypeScript client artifacts are not applicable.
schema_notes: No DB schema or migration changed.
screenshots: Not applicable; no user-visible UI changed.

human_gates.item: final financial correctness of lessons, diagnostics, quizzes and explanations
legal/tax review for tax deduction wording and official-source links
HR wording review for communications, self-assessment and privacy explanations
reward economy, stock, prices and real fulfillment operations
support answer policy for sensitive financial, tax, investment and credit questions

known_limitations: Current shell cannot complete Java-backed make verify; raw output records the Java runtime blocker/termination.
No runtime learning, diagnostics, CMS, support, points, reports, store or challenge implementation was added.
next_step: Freeze the next implementation slice separately, starting with MVP-02.03 employee registration unless a new stage decision changes the order.
